qry:define.declare: <DATA oi_escenario="102" oi_empresa="1" oi_detalle_pres="106" paso="3" leg="1923"><LIQS><LIQ oi_liquidacion="606"/></LIQS><LEGS nmd-col="1"><LEG id="1050"/><LEG id="735"/><LEG id="1949"/></LEGS><ASIGS/><EGRS/></DATA>
qry:define.name: LEGLIST

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LEG.e_numero_legajo as id, LEG.d_ape_y_nom as des, COUNT(REC.oi_tot_liq_per) as cnt, MCO.d_mod_contr as mod_contr, max(LEGPRE.oi_grupo) as oi_grupo, max(LEGPRE.grp) as grp, max(LEG.f_egreso) as f_egreso FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJE, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ99_RECIBOS as LIQREC, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as REC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, PER35_MOD_CONTR as MCO, (SELECT LEG.e_numero_legajo, LEG.oi_grupo as oi_grupo, GRP.d_grupo as grp FROM PRE05_LEGAJOS as LEG, PRE08_GRUPOS as GRP JOIN LEG.oi_grupo inner GRP.oi_grupo WHERE LEG.oi_escenario={%=#SOURCE:@oi_escenario%}) as LEGPRE JOIN EJE.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LIQREC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQREC.oi_tot_liq_per inner REC.oi_tot_liq_per, REC.oi_per_emp_ddo inner LEG.oi_per_emp_ddo, MCO.c_mod_contr inner LEG.c_modalidad, LEG.e_numero_legajo LEFT OUTER LEGPRE.e_numero_legajo WHERE EJE.oi_liquidacion in ({%=String(#SOURCE:LIQS/LIQ/@oi_liquidacion)%}) AND LIQ.c_estado=\'F\' GROUP BY LEG.e_numero_legajo, LEG.d_ape_y_nom, MCO.d_mod_contr ORDER BY des ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
